articles.title: Sturgeon tells BBC: I'm serving a sentence for crime I didn't commit
articles.description: Scotland's former first minister is challenged by Laura Kuenssberg over the SNP embezzlement scandal, and at times struggles to hold back tears.

articles.title: Watch: Key moments from Nicola Sturgeon's interview with Laura Kuenssberg
articles.description: Former First Minister of Scotland Nicola Sturgeon speaks to the BBC in her first interview since her estranged husband Peter Murrell pled guilty to embezzling £400,000 from the SNP

articles.title: Hundreds arrested and dozens of police injured after Champions League riots in France
